title: Penalty
doc_html:
§3413.  Penalty

Any person who violates any provision of this Chapter shall be fined not more than five thousand dollars, imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.

Acts 1995, No. 690, §2; Acts 2003, No. 341, §1.
